items.title: 'This may be the last time you hear my voice': Political executions surge in Iran since start of war
items.dek: Since the US and Israel attacked Iran on 28 February, the UN says it’s verified the execution of at least 32 political prisoners.
items.body: Since the US and Israel attacked Iran on 28 February, the UN says it’s verified the execution of at least 32 political prisoners.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Inside the 'kill-zone' on Ukraine's front line, where new weapons have transformed war
items.dek: Machines are increasingly replacing humans on the front line, but troops are still vital for defending territory.
items.body: Machines are increasingly replacing humans on the front line, but troops are still vital for defending territory.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: From escaping child marriage 'to an old pervert' to becoming Sierra Leone's first lady
items.dek: BBC World Service exclusive: the private world of one of Africa's most powerful political women.
